# Lameco Development Guidelines

## Framework-Specific Guidelines
- [Craft CMS Guidelines](guidelines/craft-cms.md)
- [Tailwind CSS Guidelines](guidelines/tailwind-css.md)
- [Javascript Guidelines](guidelines/javascript.md)
- [Twig Guidelines](guidelines/twig.md)

## General Principles
- Write clean, readable code with appropriate comments.
- Follow the DRY (Don't Repeat Yourself) principle.
- Use meaningful names for variables and functions.
- Keep functions small and focused on a single task.
- Make sure the output is compliant with WCAG guidelines.
